notes: Verification-only gate task. All Phase 1 components verified: data models compile, config loads YAML, scanner reads filesystem, SortFeatures orders correctly, error types implement error interface, input validation rejects path traversal and malformed slugs. go build ./... succeeds. 92 tests pass across 4 packages (config: 9 tests/100%, handler: 42 tests/96.7%, model: 17 tests/89.3%, scanner: 24 tests/95.0%). Overall coverage: 94.9%.
